results.title: Bitcoin's recent macro relief faces a challenge from Japanese interest rates
results.description: Japanese bond yields continue to rise, lifting their U.S. counterparts posing a potential headwind for risk assets.

results.title: Franklin India Technology Fund leads technology sectoral mutual funds in three-year CAGR returns; delivers 10.9% gain
results.description: Franklin India Technology Fund delivered 10.9% CAGR returns over three years and -15.0% CAGR over the last one year, according to ACE MF data on July 6.

results.title: India’s UPI to link up with Indonesia’s payment system, boost cross-border trade
results.description: New Delhi, July 7 (SocialNews.XYZ) Prime Minister Narendra Modi announced on Tuesday that India’s Unified Payments Interface (UPI) will be integrated with Indonesia’s payment system, which will enable tourists and businesses to make cross-border retail... The post India’s UPI to link up with Indonesia’s payment system, boost cross-border trade appeared first on Social News XYZ .

results.title: Gold rate today (July 7, 2026): Check 24k, 22k, 20k and 18k gold jewellery prices from Joyalukkas, Malabar Gold & Diamonds, Tanishq & IBJA in Delhi, Mumbai, Hyderabad, other cities
results.description: Gold prices saw a decline across major Indian jewellery brands today. Tanishq, Malabar Gold & Diamonds, Kalyan Jewellers, and Joyalukkas reported lower rates. These price drops were observed in cities like Delhi, Mumbai, and Chennai.

results.title: Invesco India Financial Services Fund leads banks & financial services sectoral mutual funds in one-year CAGR returns; delivers 7.2% gain
results.description: Invesco India Financial Services Fund delivered 7.2% CAGR returns over the last one year and 18.0% CAGR over three years, according to ACE MF data on July 6.
